description: No direct Rich Table instantiation in CLI handlers — use build_table() or summary_table()

description: Display primitives must be keyword-only where possible (P14)
check: python -c "import ast,sys; t=ast.parse(open('modules/clients/common/display.py').read()); names={'summary_table','output_panel','thinking_panel','build_table','cost_line','status_panel','info_panel','primary_panel'}; bad=[n.name for n in ast.walk(t) if isinstance(n,ast.FunctionDef) and n.name in names and not n.args.kwonlyargs]; print('\n'.join(bad)) if bad else None; sys.exit(len(bad))"
fix: Use keyword-only arguments (after *) for display primitives to ensure readable call sites per P14
